articles.author: Ars Staff
articles.title: On its 40th anniversary, we reassess 1986’s SpaceCamp - Ars Technica
articles.description: Is it a hidden gem, a cult classic, or hopelessly dumb? Senior Space Editor Eric Berger and Senior Technology Editor Lee Hutchinson vote "all of the above."

articles.author: Rebecca Falconer
articles.title: Classrooms lean into analog learning in the AI era - Axios
articles.description: At least 16 states — both red and blue — have introduced bills to limit classroom technology.
articles.content:
The big picture: At least 16 states  both red and blue  have introduced bills to limit classroom technology.
Case in point: Schools Beyond Screens formed with fewer than a dozen parents in Los Angel… [+3294 chars]
